# Feliciano Jiron Insurance Agency

Feliciano Jiron Insurance Agency is a locally owned, bilingual (English/Spanish) independent insurance agency serving Las Vegas, Nevada. The agency compares 15+ top-rated carriers to help individuals, families, and businesses find the right coverage at the right price — auto, home, life, renters, business, and boat insurance.

## Canonical domain

https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app

## Contact

- Address: 2585 S. Nellis Blvd., Las Vegas, NV 89121
- Phone: (702) 522-0079
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9 am–5 pm
- Languages: English and Spanish

## High-value pages

### Home
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/
Bilingual Las Vegas insurance agency — free quotes, 15+ carriers compared, personal 1-on-1 guidance.

### Services overview
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services
All six coverage types offered by the agency.

### Auto Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/auto
Liability, full coverage, SR-22, roadside assistance, multi-car discounts.

### Home Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/home
Dwelling, personal property, liability, fire/theft/storm coverage. Home+auto bundle discounts.

### Life Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/life
Term, whole, and final expense policies.

### Business Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/business
General liability, commercial property, workers comp, commercial auto, BOP packages.

### Renters Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/renters
Personal belongings, liability, theft protection — affordable and fast to set up.

### Boat Insurance
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/services/boat
Hull & motor, on-water liability, trailer coverage, towing & assistance for Lake Mead and beyond.

### Free Quote
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/quote
Start a free, no-obligation insurance quote. A real bilingual agent follows up.

### About Us
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/about
Meet the team — Feliciano Jiron, Maxwell Saavedra, Engelbert Mora, and Gunnar Jiron.

### Team: Feliciano Jiron
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/feliciano-jiron
Agency Owner — expertise in auto, home, life, and business insurance.

https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/maxwell-saavedra
Insurance Agent — licensed in 31 states, specializing in Health & Life.

https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/engelbert-mora
Insurance Agent — bilingual, empathy-first approach.

### Team: Gunnar Jiron
https://felicianoinsurancehub.replit.app/gunnar-jiron
Marketing Director — community outreach and local business partnerships.
